features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Confirm the project can install dependencies, run verification, and start from a clean checkout.

features.name: Purge v1 + scope the deterministic gate
features.description: Remove the superseded v1 14-step LLM pipeline (steps/, cli.py, __main__.py, models.py, workspace.py, runner.py) and its ~220 real-LLM tests; keep llm.py (M2-reserved) and the repo smoke test. Re-scope ./init.sh + pytest to `sobench tool tests` (exclude references/). Add pyproject.toml pytest config + benchmark_projects/ gitignore.
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit 50409d0. ./init.sh green in 0.01s, 0 references/ items collected (was 135), no LLM. v1 recoverable in git history.

features.name: contracts/bench_record.py
features.description: SpatialMetrics + BenchRecord pydantic models (extra=forbid), the fixed result schema (spec §4.4).
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit 803ddc3. tests/test_contracts.py round-trip + extra-field rejection + null metrics, real identifiers. 5 tests.

features.name: contracts/{task,data,metric} + freeze.py
features.description: Contract models + freeze flow (spec §5): open real h5ad, validate ground_truth_column/spatial_key against actual obs/obsm, case-subset, metric-subset; PASS freezes 3 contracts + freeze_report with sha256 hashes, FAIL writes errors only; drafts preserved.
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit 803ddc3. freeze pass + 4 real failure modes (stale Cell_class, bad spatial_key, bad metric, unknown case) + hash byte-match, against MERFISH_0.04.h5ad. 6 tests.

features.name: metrics.py
features.description: compute(pred, true, metrics) aligning by cell_id JOIN; AlignmentError on missing/extra; sklearn ARI/NMI (spec §10).
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit 9084c5a. Real MERFISH_0.04 ground_truth: perfect=1.0, permutation-invariant, degraded matches sklearn, int labels, missing/extra raise. 7 tests.

features.name: checker.py
features.description: 7-check smoke output validator (spec §7); check 7 = order-independent multiset equality to expected obs_names.
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit 1783148. First 100 real obs_names: valid passes, each failure mode + reorder-passes + dup/extra/missing fail + bool/float rejected. 14 tests.

features.name: aggregator.py
features.description: BenchRecords -> results.csv, fixed 15-column order, null metric = empty cell (spec §4.4).
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit b889a31. Real-identifier records (success + invalid_output): header order, float cells, empty null cells, row count. 5 tests.

features.name: experience.py
features.description: Append-only experience store (spec §11): 3 indexes, newest-first, schema_version, atomic os.replace, real h5ad fingerprint, partial/missing handling.
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit b4433a1. Realistic project over MERFISH_0.04: all 3 indexes, independent statuses, real fingerprint (obs_columns/has_raw=False), real metric value, partial-when-env-absent, newest-first, no leftover .tmp. 8 tests.

features.name: scaffold.py
features.description: Project tree + fixed method-agnostic run_benchmark.py template that delegates to sobench.runner (spec §9).
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit be5ada1. Tree created, template compiles, references runner, no method names, idempotent. 5 tests.

features.name: runner.py
features.description: run(project_dir): load frozen contracts, select interpreter from env_record, subprocess driver, validate via checker, align by cell_id join, compute metrics, write BenchRecord (spec §9-§10). build_record() is the deterministic core.
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit e37f5c7. build_record vs real MERFISH_0.04 ground_truth: success ARI/NMI=1.0, dropped/duplicate id -> invalid_output, nonzero rc -> failed, contracts-absent -> clear FileNotFoundError. 5 tests. Live subprocess path = integration-only.

features.name: env_builder.py
features.description: build_env(project_dir, method): mamba-then-conda env at content-hash prefix (idempotent), interpreter_path in env_record.json (spec §3 env).
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit 6fb952c. Pure helpers env_yml_hash + env_record_is_current tested (env.yml mirrors real STAGATE_pyG requirement.txt). 4 tests. Real env creation = integration-only.

features.name: smoke.py
features.description: Deterministic 100-spot smoke h5ad from real case (fixed seed) + driver --smoke run + atomic driver_record append (spec §7).
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit cb8efb1. make_smoke_h5ad + append_attempt vs real MERFISH_0.04: determinism, n=100, structure preserved (genes/spatial/ground_truth/aligned rows), <100 edge, record grows with final_status+repair_count, no leftover .tmp. 5 tests. Live driver = integration-only.

features.name: tool/sobench.py CLI + agent skills + integration test
features.description: Stdlib argparse CLI (7 subcommands -> python -m sobench.<module>); 6 agent-instructions/*/SKILL.md docs (spec §12); integration test (skip unless conda+repos+SOBENCH_RUN_INTEGRATION=1) asserting spec §13 end-state.
features.evidence: 2026-06-20: commit 0519187. CLI driven as subprocess (--help/unknown/scaffold/validate pass+fail) against real MERFISH_0.04. 6 CLI tests. Integration skips with explicit reason. End-to-end scaffold->validate->aggregate verified manually. ./init.sh: 70 passed, 1 skipped in ~4s.

features.name: M1 operational goal: agent constructs the full MERFISH benchmark
features.description: The external coding agent, guided by the 6 sobench skills, constructs all 3 methods × 5 MERFISH cases: inspect papers/repos/h5ad, draft+freeze contracts, write drivers/env.yml/data_adapter, build conda envs, smoke-validate, run the matrix, write results.csv + experience entries. Verified by tests/test_integration.py with SOBENCH_RUN_INTEGRATION=1.
features.evidence: Substrate complete and verified (deterministic, no LLM). This operational run is the agent's job on top of the substrate; integration test exists and is gated on conda env builds + agent-produced construction artifacts.
